remarks: Welcome to 4 Dairy Farm Road, a convenient Norwalk location close to beaches, shopping, dining, and major commute routes. This spacious residence offers the perfect combination of comfort, functionality, and recent updates. With 3 bedrooms, 2 full bathrooms, and 2,556 square feet of living space, the home features a layout designed for everyday living and entertaining. The sun-filled main living areas include the living room with fireplace flowing into the dining room with glass slider to the brand-new patio. The kitchen features granite counters and abundant cabinetry and counter space. A few steps down from the kitchen is a den with glass slider to the enclosed porch creating the perfect setting to relax or entertain year-round overlooking the beautiful property. The spacious primary bedroom offers a comfortable retreat, complemented by two additional bedrooms and updated bathrooms. The fully finished lower level provides additional living space with a spacious playroom plus access to the laundry room. Recent improvements include some new appliances, marble detailing around the fireplace, replacement of the upper chimney and cap, all new bathroom ventilation systems, downstairs windows, and recent air conditioning and furnace servicing, providing peace of mind for the next owner. Conveniently located near shopping centers, restaurants, Stew Leonard's, the Maritime Aquarium, beaches, parks, and I-95, this home is close to it all yet tucked in a quiet neighborhood setting.
